channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10620] replay-single test_53c: checkstat -v /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f attribute check failed
item.description:
replay-single test_53c - checkstat -v /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f attribute check failed
^^^^^^^^^^^^^ DO NOT REMOVE LINE ABOVE ^^^^^^^^^^^^^

This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/4151acda-fd04-11e7-a6ad-52540065bddc

test_53c failed with the following error:

checkstat -v   /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f attribute check failed

test_logs:

Command completed successfully
Failover mds1 to onyx-39vm8
00:02:02 (1516348922) waiting for onyx-39vm8 network 900 secs ...
00:02:02 (1516348922) network interface is UP
CMD: onyx-39vm8 hostname
mount facets: mds1
CMD: onyx-39vm8 test -b /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1
CMD: onyx-39vm8 e2label /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1
Starting mds1:   /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-39vm8 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre   		                   /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
onyx-39vm8: mount.lustre: increased '/sys/devices/virtual/block/dm-0/queue/max_sectors_kb' from 512 to 16384
CMD: onyx-39vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: onyx-39vm8 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/mpi/gcc/openmpi/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/sbin:/root/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
onyx-39vm8: onyx-39vm8.onyx.hpdd.intel.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: onyx-39vm8 e2label /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
CMD: onyx-39vm8 e2label /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
CMD: onyx-39vm8 e2label /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
CMD: onyx-39vm8 lctl set_param fail_loc=0
fail_loc=0
Can't lstat /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f: No such file or directory
 replay-single test_53c: @@@@@@ FAIL: checkstat -v   /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f attribute check failed 
  Trace dump:
item.environment:
Failover
RHEL 7.4 Server/ldiskfs
SLES 12 SP3 Client
2.10.57
item.summary: replay-single test_53c: checkstat -v /mnt/lustre/d53c.replay-single-1/f attribute check failed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
